rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Strike Pltf'S Third Amd Complt

rulings.Case Title: A PACKARD CORP VS RANGER INS CO
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF BRADY, VORWERCK & RYDER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER OF BRADY, VORWERCK & RYDER TO 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE CIRCUMSTANCES AND DATE OF DISCOVERY OF MALPRACTICE. DEMURRER TO 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD AND 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (302/AJR/CW(EX))

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Gary Warren Fanger, Aka Gary Barns, Travel Nurse International, Diana Palacio'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer (Per Ex Parte Order Of 9/25/02)
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER GRANTED. REQUEST FOR FEES DENIED. (302/AJR/JH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Demurrers To And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Second Amended Cross-Complaint Of Ronald Vidal And Laura Vidal
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CONVERSION, PERSONAL PROPERTY CAUSES OF ACTION OTHERWISE OVERRULED. (302/AJR/CL)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA PAGE VS. JOHN D. ROUSE et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION EQUITABLE CONTRIBUTION. INSUFFICIENT PRESENTED FACTS TO GRANT EQUITABLE RELIEF. MOTON FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION STATUTORY INDEMNIFICATION GRANT SEE SECTION 706 SF PUBLIC WORKS CODE. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: BETTE GRANGER VS. ASBESTO DEFENDANTS et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. ANSWER TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES ARE EVASIVE ACCORDINGLY BURDEN SHIFTED - REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED FAILURE TO SATISFY REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 437C(H). (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE LAVIN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ADULT PROBAT
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion For Recinsideration Of Order Granting In Part Defts. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or In The Alternative, For Relief Due To Excusable Neglect, Inadvertence Or Mistake
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION GRANTED. DETAILED FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS IN AMENDED COMPLAINT CONSTITUTE NEW FACTS FOR PURPOSES OF CCP 1008 & JOP. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. JOP GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENT RETENTION FAILURE TO PROVIDE SAFE WORK PLACE. (302/AJR/CL)

rulings.Case Title: GINBINEH TESSEMA AYELE VS. KAISER PERMANENTE
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM BURDEN COMPELLING ARBITRATION. (302/AJR/JH)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
ANDREW WARRI et al VS. CAREY LIMOUSINE OF S.F., INC. et al
BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. A CORPORATION VS. JOSEPH EUGENE YOUNT et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANT IF MOVANT PROVIDES TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. OTHERWISE, OFF CALENDAR. (302/AJR/ju)

rulings.Case Title: CRYSTAL LI MING LEI VS. MBNA et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE OVERRULED - ALLEGATIONS SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH DUTY. DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO UNFAIR PRACTICES ALLEGED. DAMAGES NOT RECOVERABLE IN B&P 17200 ACTION. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: CRYSTAL LI MING LEI VS. MBNA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Strike Plaintiffs Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees Allegations
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND ATTORNEY FEES. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN TROMPETER et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Quash And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons

rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Re Preliminary Injunction And Tro
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. MOVANT TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE & DISCUSS AMOUNT OF BOND. (302/AJR/ju)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID AGRETELIS VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE DENIED. PETITIONER RESPONSIBLE TO RESET HEARING DATE AND PRESERVE EVIDENCE. HEARING REQUIRED. PARTIES TO PROVIDE SUSPENSION DATES OF LICENSE AND DATES OF TEMPORARY LICENSE. (302/AJR/MD)

rulings.Case Title: PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC VS. DAMIAN PLUMLEIGH et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PER CCP 437C(G). (302/AJR/ju)
